title: 01892_Instant_Soup_Cheap_Pruning_Ensembles_in_A_Single_Pass_Can_Draw_Lottery_Tickets_from_Large_Models
positive_examples: Reduces computational and memory footprints of large pre-trained models, making them more accessible for fine-tuning without industry-standard hardware.
Improves fine-tuning performance comparable to model soups at marginal training cost, thus enhancing the efficiency of model training and deployment.
